phase1_core.state_contamination: Pass - Execution engines generate `SimulatedTrade` instances without mutating the `signal` or `context` objects.
phase1_core.timezone_leaks: Pass - Timezone conversions use safe tz_convert to `America/New_York` explicitly.
phase1_core.look_ahead_bias: Pass - Strict `bars_5m.index > signal.signal_time` check. VWAP gate properly uses `.shift(1)` to avoid intrabar look-ahead.
phase1_core.runner_signature_robustness: Pass - Runner uses robust source-hashing signature (`current_code_signature`) of core engine logic to prevent stale results.

missing_super_calls: engine/strategy_lab/strategies/dominance_flip_reversal/variants.py: FlipVariant.build_candidates completely overwrites F01Release.build_candidates instead of calling super(), violating inheritance integrity.
filter_until_zero_bugs: o06: Missing `requires_spy_5m = True`. `context.spy_5m` is None, `green_first_candle` returns False, resulting in zero candidates.
d08: Missing `requires_spy_5m = True`. `_spy_gap_pct` returns None, dropping all candidates.
o03: Missing `requires_spy_5m = True`. SPY ML features compute as 0.0/None, silently corrupting model predictions.

phase3_validation.oos_discipline: Pass - `check_oos_prerequisite` strictly guards OOS testsets until prior funnel in-sample stages are cleared.
phase3_validation.dashboard_port_safety: Pass - Dashboard properly handles port arguments and uses `connect(read_only=True)` to prevent DB locks/writes.
